violations.text: Establishment is not consistently keeping records for the use of time as a public health control for pizza slices. New Violation. Correct By: 04/08/2025

Chlorine sanitizer solution was observed in excess of 200 parts per million (ppm). A chlorine sanitizer solution applied to food contact surfaces must be between 50-100 ppm. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/08/2025

The dumpster outside is located on gravel. The outdoor storage surface for refuse, recyclables, and returnables must be constructed of nonabsorbent material such as concrete or asphalt and must be smooth, durable, and sloped to drain. New Violation. Correct By: 05/30/2025

The door to the outside, located in the back, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 04/04/2024

The dumpster outside is located on gravel. The outdoor storage surface for refuse, recyclables, and returnables must be constructed of nonabsorbent material such as concrete or asphalt and must be smooth, durable, and sloped to drain. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 04/04/2024

Establishment did not have a person in charge that has successfully completed an approved food safety certification course. Please email inspector proof that additional employees have been enrolled and completed an approved food safety course. New Violation. Correct By: 04/04/2024

There was no evidence that employees are required to report to the person in charge information about their health (illnesses, symptoms) as they relate to diseases that are transmissible through food. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/21/2024

Food was observed not marked with the date of preparation. Ready-to-eat time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods prepared in the establishment and held for more than 24 hours must be marked with the date of preparation. New Violation. Correct By: 03/21/2024

Establishment is using time as a public health control for their pizza slices without prior approval. Establishment is to discontinue using time as a public health control until an approval is granted. Establishment must submit an application to the Rhode Island Department of Health Center of Food Protection to get approval. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/21/2024

The door to the outside, located in the back, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 04/04/2024

Single-service articles (pizza boxes) were observed stored on the floor in the prep area. Single-service articles must be stored at least 6 inches off the ground. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/21/2024

The dumpster outside is located on gravel. The outdoor storage surface for refuse, recyclables, and returnables must be constructed of nonabsorbent material such as concrete or asphalt and must be smooth, durable, and sloped to drain. New Violation. Correct By: 04/04/2024
